bird.name: Grey petrel
bird.summary: The grey petrel (Procellaria cinerea), also called the gray petrel, brown petrel, pediunker or grey shearwater, is a species of seabird in…

locations.name: 南半球
locations.summary: 南半球（英語：Southern Hemisphere）是指地球赤道以南的半球。南半球表面有80.9%是水，佔地球的57.1%；19.1%是陸地，佔地球的32.7%。 南半球包含了地球的五大洲：亚洲印度尼西亞南部、非洲中部及南部、大洋洲絕大…

relations.subject: Grey petrel
relations.evidence: It is pelagic and occurs in the open seas of the Southern Hemisphere, mainly between 32°S and 58°S

relations.subject: Grey petrel
relations.evidence: Introduced predators such as cats, brown rats and black rats are contributing to the decline, as is longline fishing
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
